fields.title: Mulchanderi Salwar Suit_Lavender
fields.description:
Elegant and graceful Mul Chanderi salwar suit designed for a classy and sophisticated look 💛
🌿 Soft & lightweight Mul Chanderi fabric
✨ Hand embroidery with sequin detailed yoke
🤍 Crochet lace detailed neck & sleeves
🎀 Beautiful gathering detailing
👗 Flattering A-line pattern
🧵 Comes with comfortable lining
Perfect for festive wear, small functions, office wear & special occasions 🌸
Stylish, breathable and super comfortable for all-day wear
fields.style: Hand Emb + Sequin Yoke, Crochet Lace N&S, Gathering Detail, A-Line, With Lining

fields.title: Mulchanderi Salwar Suit Coffee Brown
fields.description:
Elegant and graceful Mul Chanderi salwar suit designed for a classy and sophisticated look 💛
🌿 Soft & lightweight Mul Chanderi fabric
✨ Hand embroidery with sequin detailed yoke
🤍 Crochet lace detailed neck & sleeves
🎀 Beautiful gathering detailing
👗 Flattering A-line pattern
🧵 Comes with comfortable lining
Perfect for festive wear, small functions, office wear & special occasions 🌸
Stylish, breathable and super comfortable for all-day wear
fields.style: Hand Emb + Sequin Yoke, Crochet Lace N&S, Gathering Detail, A-Line, With Lining
fields.wash_care:
"Gentle hand wash separately
* Use mild detergent
* Do not bleach
* Do not soak for long
* Dry in shade
* Low heat iron (inside out)
* Dry clean recommended for first wash"
fields.return_rules:
Returns:
Unboxing Video Requirement: Customers must record a clear, continuous unboxing video while opening the package. This video is mandatory to process any return, replacement, or refund request. Requests submitted without an unboxing video will not be eligible for return or refund.

Items may be returned within 7 days of delivery if they meet the following conditions:

1. The item is unused and in original condition
2. Original packaging and tags are intact
3. The item was not purchased as a final sale item
4. Non-Returnable Items

Returns may not be accepted for:

1. Used or damaged items caused by the customer
2. Items without original packaging or tags

Refunds:

1. Once the returned item is received and inspected, we will notify you regarding the approval of the refund.
If approved, refunds will be issued to the original payment method within a reasonable processing time.
Shipping fees are non-refundable unless the return is due to an incorrect or defective item.


Delivery Time:

Orders are usually delivered within 4–7 business days, depending on the delivery location. Delays may occur during holidays, high-volume sale periods, or due to courier issues.

fields.title: Zari Threadwork Cotton Schiffli Kurta
fields.description:
Cotton Schiffli Kurta Set ✨
A beautiful blend of elegance and comfort 💛
🌿 Premium cotton Schiffli kurta
✨ Delicate zari threadwork detailing
👖 Solid matching pants
🤍 Lace bordered dupatta for a graceful finish
Soft, breathable & perfect for daily wear, office wear, small functions and festive occasions 🌸
Lightweight, classy and easy to carry all day long.
fields.style: Straight-cut kurtha set
fields.wash_care:
"Gentle hand wash separately
* Use mild detergent
* Do not bleach
